let w1: L satisfy { exists(k2: L) { trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](w1, m.smul(w0, k2)) != m.smul(w0, trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](w1, k2)) } }

proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T2: CommRing](x0: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { T0.0 = x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) + x0(x2, x0(x3, x1)) + x0(x3, x0(x1, x2)) } = lie_bracket_jacobi_constraint[T2, T0](x0) }[L, R](trivial_lie_bracket[R, L])

let w0: L satisfy { exists(k0: L, k1: L) { L.0 != trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](w0, trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](k0, k1)) + trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](k0, trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](k1, w0)) + trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](k1, trivial_lie_bracket[R, L](w0, k0)) } }
